description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof and a minimalist rectangular form. The exterior features large floor-to-ceiling glass panels on the front and rear facades, allowing for ample natural light and visibility. The structure sits on a striped green and black platform, which may represent a stylized lawn or base. The side walls appear to be clad in wood paneling, adding warmth and texture to the otherwise sleek design. The front facade includes a prominent glass door and several tall windows, while the rear is more opaque with fewer openings. The overall aesthetic is contemporary, with clean lines and a strong emphasis on transparency and simplicity.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large glass panels, and wood-clad sides, set on a striped green and black base.
description_view_0: Front view showing a glass door and several tall floor-to-ceiling windows, emphasizing the transparent facade.
description_view_1: Side view revealing wood paneling and the depth of the flat roof, with minimal window openings.
description_view_2: Rear view with fewer windows and a more opaque appearance, highlighting privacy on this side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing wood paneling and the flat roof's overhang, with little glazing.
